topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into CSS. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Frontend Developer roles.
whyItMatters: CSS is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing CSS in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given CSS snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of CSS?
How does CSS handle memory management?
